title: Infinite Journey/ In This Together…
collaboration: Dance performance by Eveline Van Bauwel
description:
Software developed in OpenFrameworks to create interactive color compositions and realtime effects that are the sole scenic element on stage
	                        / The colors pallets used are gathered in real time by a Kinect scanning the dancers' cloth vertically
	                        / MadMapper and video projection merging is used to seamlessly link the two projectors that cover the ulltra-wide screen
